# HSK Level 5 Word List

阿姨 | āyí | maternal aunt; step-mother; childcare worker
啊 | a | modal particle showing affirmation
唉 | āi | interjection of agreement
矮 | ǎi | low; short
爱 | ài | to love; affection
爱好 | àihào | to like; hobby
爱护 | àihù | to cherish; protect
爱情 | àiqíng | romance; love
爱惜 | àixī | to cherish; treasure
爱心 | àixīn | compassion
安静 | ānjìng | quiet; peaceful
安排 | ānpái | to arrange; plan
安全 | ānquán | safe; secure
安慰 | ānwèi | to comfort; console
安装 | ānzhuāng | install; erect
岸 | àn | bank; shore; beach
暗 | àn | dark; gloomy; secret
按时 | ànshí | on time; on schedule
按照 | ànzhào | according to
八 | bā | eight
把 | bǎ | to hold; grasp; handle
把握 | bǎwò | to grasp; seize
爸爸 | bàba | father
吧 | ba | modal particle; ...right?
白 | bái | white; pure; bright
百 | bǎi | hundred
摆 | bǎi | to arrange; exhibit
搬 | bān | to move; shift
班 | bān | team; class; squad
